logs.message: Rota.Infrastructure depends on Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting (>= 8.0.3) but Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting 8.0.3 was not found. An approximate best match of Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting 9.0.0 was resolved.
